[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A stylized profile screen shows the username “hi paki,” a small avatar image, and two status boxes on a dark blue background with soft circular shapes.

Main Subject: The main focus is a centered user interface card containing a username at the top, an avatar on the left, and two rectangular panels in the middle area showing limits and levels.

Setting: The image appears to be a digital app or website profile interface shown on a dark, navy-blue background. The environment is purely graphic with no physical setting, and the lighting is simulated as flat screen UI styling.

Visual Details: A large rounded rectangle card sits centered on the screen with a faint border. The background outside the card is dark blue with translucent, overlapping circle patterns. Inside the card, the username “hi paki” appears in large white text near the top, with a smaller gray handle directly beneath it. A gray pill-shaped button labeled “FREE USER” sits under the handle. On the left side, there is a circular avatar image featuring a cartoon-style person with short black hair, a dark hat with vertical gray lines, and a red earring-like detail, set against colorful drawn elements including a red-pink background and small graphic shapes. Across the middle, there are two horizontally aligned rounded rectangles: the left one has a red outline and contains a label in gray text and a large “0/15” display with smaller text “LIMIT” above it; the right one has a teal/green outline and a label in gray text with a star icon and shows “Lv 2” in bold white text. At the bottom of the card, faint gray text is centered.

Visible Text: hi paki
@628218822889
FREE USER
LIMIT
0/15
LEVEL GRUP
Lv 2
Hutoa Assister [1] · Premium Profile System

Practical Summary: The image shows a dark-themed profile UI with a username, an avatar, and two status boxes indicating a limit count and a level. It also includes a small footer line with system-style text.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
